hypothesis.thesis_statement: Positive post-earnings surprise drift should continue for several trading days after the announcement in the broad A-share universe.
hypothesis.mechanism: Analyst and investor under-reaction to earnings information can make price adjustment gradual rather than immediate, especially when attention is fragmented.

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: The effect may compress after crowded attention periods or during earnings seasons with unusually fast information diffusion.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: The signal assumes reported earnings surprise still carries incremental information after standard neutralization choices.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: If the sealed OOS rank IC is outside the committed effect band or the strategy fails hard rules after costs, reject the thesis.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: Expected to be moderately cost-sensitive because event clustering can create turnover spikes around announcement dates.
